common.buildSomethingAmazingWithOurTools:
[TR] Build something amazing with our tools. Start your journey today and
          discover what's possible.

common.intuitiveInterfaceDesignedForDevelopersO: [TR] Intuitive interface designed for developers of all levels.

common.noResultsFoundTryADifferent: [TR] No results found. Try a different search term.

about.weAreATeamOfPassionate:
[TR] We are a team of passionate developers building tools that make
        internationalization easy and safe.
about.toSimplifyInternationalizationAndMakeEve:
[TR] To simplify internationalization and make every app accessible to users
        around the world.
about.thisToolSavedUsWeeksOf: [TR] This tool saved us weeks of manual work during our i18n migration.
about.janeSmithEngineeringLeadAtTechcorp: [TR] — Jane Smith, Engineering Lead at TechCorp
about.scansYourCodebaseAndFindsAll: [TR] Scans your codebase and finds all translatable strings automatically.
about.riskClassificationEnsuresYourCodeStays: [TR] Risk classification ensures your code stays safe during migration.
about.platformUsageStatisticsForTheLast: [TR] Platform usage statistics for the last quarter

edge-cases.dontMissOutOnThisOpportunity: [TR] Don't miss out on this opportunity!
edge-cases.itsCompletelyFreeNoCreditCard: [TR] It's completely free — no credit card required.
edge-cases.needHelpWereHereForYou: [TR] Need help? We're here for you.

empty-states.thisPageTestsEmptyStateError:
[TR] This page tests empty state, error boundary, and logical expression
        patterns from real-world projects.
empty-states.tryAdjustingYourSearchOrFilters:
[TR] Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you are looking
              for.
empty-states.youDoNotHaveAnyPosts: [TR] You do not have any posts yet. Start creating content.
empty-states.uploadSomeFilesToSeeThem: [TR] Upload some files to see them here
empty-states.theseUseLogicalAndToConditionally:
[TR] These use logical AND to conditionally show strings. Scanner should
          catch these but currently does not.
empty-states.thereWasAnIssueWithOur:
[TR] There was an issue with our application. This could be a temporary
            issue, please try your action again.
empty-states.sorryWeCouldNotFindThe: [TR] Sorry, we could not find the page you are looking for.
empty-states.butDoNotWorryYouCan:
[TR] But do not worry, you can find plenty of other things on our
            homepage.

advanced-jsx.thisPageTestsTemplateLiteralsMultiline:
[TR] This page tests template literals, multi-line text, custom component
        props, plural patterns, and other advanced JSX patterns.
advanced-jsx.dontMissOutOnThisOpportunity: [TR] Don't miss out on this opportunity!
advanced-jsx.thisIsACompleteSentenceIn: [TR] This is a complete sentence in a template literal.
advanced-jsx.thisIsALongParagraphThat:
[TR] This is a long paragraph that spans multiple lines in the source code
          and should be treated as a single translatable string by the scanner.
advanced-jsx.ourPlatformHelpsYouBuildDeploy:
[TR] Our platform helps you build, deploy, and scale your applications with
          ease. Get started today and see the difference.
advanced-jsx.followTheseStepsToSetUp: [TR] Follow these steps to set up your project.
advanced-jsx.yourSessionWillExpireSoonPlease: [TR] Your session will expire soon. Please save your work.
advanced-jsx.youAreAllCaughtUpCheck: [TR] You are all caught up! Check back later for updates.
advanced-jsx.scannerCannotTraceTextValuesThrough:
[TR] Scanner cannot trace text values through spread operators. This is a
          known limitation.

[TR] This action cannot be undone. All of your data will be permanently
            removed.

[TR] This will permanently delete your post and remove all associated
            data.

[TR] This is a demo application using a test environment. No real
            transactions will be processed.
